title: Brute Force / Password Spray
description: Detects brute force / password spray attacks via repeated Windows failed logon events (EventID 4625) from the same source.
author: SOC Team
aql: SELECT sourceip AS src_ip, GEO::LOOKUP(sourceip, 'country') AS src_country, LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) AS dc_host, UNIQUECOUNT(username) AS distinct_accounts, COUNT(*) AS failed_count FROM events WHERE UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%AgentDevice=WindowsLog%' AND UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%EventID=4625%' AND UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%AgentLogFile=Security%' AND username NOT ILIKE '%$' GROUP BY src_ip, src_country, dc_host HAVING COUNT(*) >= 15 OR UNIQUECOUNT(username) >= 10 ORDER BY failed_count DESC LAST 10 MINUTES
